semantics.label: Content
semantics.description: Text can contain text, images, and code

fields.label: Text
fields.description: Write general description as markdown code

fields.label: Image
fields.description: An optional image appended to instructions

fields.label: Show Editor?
fields.description: Should an editor be displayed to the user

fields.label: External Library URLs (YAML)
fields.description: Optional YAML map for overriding hosted runtime libraries (teavmAssetBaseUrl, blockly, codeMirror, etc.). Leave empty to use the default versioned jsDelivr/GitHub TeaVM assets.

fields.label: Show console
fields.description: If enabled, the integrated console will be shown below the editor.

fields.label: Show save and load buttons
fields.description: If enabled, learners can download their code and load it again later.

semantics.label: Editor Settings
semantics.description: Defines how the editor is pre-populated and how Java code is structured.

fields.label: Instructions Image
fields.description: An optional image appended to instructions

fields.label: Main class name
fields.description: The public class name used as the entry point (must match the class declared in the code). Default: Main

fields.label: Pre code
fields.description: Java code prepended before the student's code (e.g. import statements or helper classes).

fields.label: Default Code
fields.description: Default code shown in the editor. Students can modify this.

fields.label: Post code
fields.description: Java code appended after the student's code (e.g. test helper methods).

fields.label: Standard Input
fields.description: Input provided via stdin when the program runs (one value per line).

semantics.label: Grading Settings
semantics.description: Defines how the student's code is evaluated.

fields.label: Grading method
fields.description: How to evaluate the student's code output.

options.label: By Solution (compare output with reference solution)
By Output Match (check output against expected text)

fields.label: Solution Code
fields.description: Reference solution: runs alongside the student code and its output is compared. Warning: visible in page source!

fields.label: Expected Output
fields.description: Expected console output. The student output is compared after trimming whitespace.

fields.label: Trim whitespace when comparing
fields.description: If enabled, leading/trailing whitespace is ignored when comparing outputs.

libraryStrings.javaFeedbackSuccess: Your code produces the correct output.
libraryStrings.javaFeedbackFailure: Your code output does not match the expected result.
libraryStrings.javaFeedbackOutputMatch: Your code produces the expected output.
libraryStrings.javaFeedbackOutputNoMatch: Your code output does not match the expected result.
